task_description: Identify 5 competitors for Figma and create a structured comparison report.

input_data.context: Figma is a collaborative interface design tool that runs in the browser. It enables teams to design, prototype, and gather feedback in a single platform. Figma supports real-time collaboration, component libraries, and design systems. It was acquired by Adobe in 2023 and is widely used for UI/UX design across the tech industry.
